issue.title: [platform] Align infra verification with the deployed compose file
issue.goal: Make the infra verification gate validate the same compose definition that deployment actually ships and runs.
acceptanceCriteria: The compose file validated in CI is the same file deployed on the server.
The deploy job cannot drift from the verified infra definition without failing verification.
Infra policy checks continue to cover ports, mounts, and image/version reproducibility.

description: The infra verification gate currently checks a different compose source than the one the deploy job copies and runs. That leaves a gap where CI can pass while production uses an unverified definition.
